title: rosa mollis var. spinescens
intro: Rosa mollis var. spinescens, also known as a variety of the rose family, is a flowering plant native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Rosa mollis var. spinescens include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
